events.name: trigger.entered
events.doc: A body began overlapping a trigger volume. Key: the trigger entity.

events.name: trigger.exited
events.doc: A body stopped overlapping a trigger volume. Key: the trigger entity.

events.name: contact.began
events.doc: Physics contact created between two bodies. Dispatched after the physics step in body-pair order (Appendix A phase 6). Key: each involved entity.

payload.name: normal
payload.doc: Contact normal, world space, from self toward other.

payload.name: impulse
payload.doc: Total normal impulse of the first contact.

events.name: contact.ended
events.doc: Physics contact between two bodies ceased. Dispatched after the physics step in body-pair order. Key: each involved entity.

events.name: state.finished
events.doc: A sequence state's playhead reached its end (end mode 'finish'). Sequence chaining rides this event (spec 4.2). Key: the owning entity.

payload.name: entity
payload.doc: The entity owning the state machine.

payload.name: region
payload.doc: The region containing the finished state.

events.name: entity.spawned
events.doc: An entity went live at structural apply (Appendix A phase 8), after its initial states entered. Key: the spawned entity.

payload.name: parent
payload.doc: The parent it was attached under.

events.name: entity.despawned
events.doc: An entity was removed at structural apply, after its full exit chains ran; its handles read .alive == false. Key: the despawned entity.

events.name: action.pressed
events.doc: A named input action activated (Appendix A phase 2). Digital bindings report strength 1. Key: global.

payload.name: device
payload.doc: Originating device index; 0 is the primary.

events.name: action.released
events.doc: A named input action deactivated. Key: global.

payload.name: device
payload.doc: Originating device index; 0 is the primary.

functions.name: int
functions.doc: Convert float to int, truncating toward zero. NaN or a value outside int64 range is a runtime expression error.

functions.name: sign
functions.doc: 1 for positive, -1 for negative, 0 for zero and NaN.

functions.name: round
functions.doc: Nearest integral value, halves away from zero (exact).

functions.name: sqrt
functions.doc: Square root (IEEE correctly rounded). Negative input yields NaN; comparisons against NaN are false.

functions.name: min
functions.doc: Smaller of a and b (b < a selects b; NaN operands select a).

functions.name: max
functions.doc: Larger of a and b (a < b selects b; NaN operands select a).

functions.name: quat
functions.doc: Construct a quaternion from raw components (NOT normalized; rotation use requires unit length — core/math policy).

functions.name: length_squared
functions.doc: Squared length (no sqrt — cheaper for radius checks).

functions.name: normalize
functions.doc: Unit vector; the zero vector normalizes to zero (core/math policy).

functions.name: distance_squared
functions.doc: Squared distance (no sqrt — cheaper for radius checks).

functions.name: rotate
functions.doc: Rotate v by the UNIT quaternion q.

verbs.name: version
verbs.summary: print engine name, version, and build info

verbs.name: selftest
verbs.summary: run the doctest registry embedded in the engine binary

flags.name: filter
flags.doc: doctest test-case filter pattern (e.g. 'cli.*')

verbs.name: help
verbs.summary: show the verb list or one verb's flags and usage

positionals.name: verb
positionals.doc: verb to describe; omit for the full verb list

verbs.name: api
verbs.summary: emit, diff, or generate from engine_api.json, the canonical API document

flags.name: out
flags.doc: dump: write the document to this path instead of printing it

flags.name: out-dir
flags.doc: codegen: directory for the four generated artifacts

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.doc: codegen: TS toolchain content-hash cache (regenerable, never committed)

flags.name: selfhost
flags.doc: codegen: run the self-hosted TS-on-QuickJS generator (the default)

flags.name: bootstrap
flags.doc: codegen: run the TEMPORARY native bootstrap generator instead

flags.name: verify-equivalence
flags.doc: codegen: run BOTH generators and byte-compare all four artifacts

positionals.name: input
positionals.doc: diff: baseline engine_api.json; codegen: input document (default api/engine_api.json)

verbs.name: script
verbs.summary: typecheck, lint, transpile, and benchmark TypeScript on the embedded runtime

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.doc: content-hash cache directory (regenerable, never committed)

flags.name: stats
flags.doc: build: report {transpiled, cache_hits} counters in the payload

flags.name: entities
flags.doc: bench: entity count for the budget sweep

flags.name: ticks
flags.doc: bench: measured ticks (after warmup)

flags.name: warmup
flags.doc: bench: unmeasured warmup ticks before the window

flags.name: naive
flags.doc: bench: per-field host-hook accessors (the chatty comparison mode)

positionals.name: path
positionals.doc: TypeScript source file (bench: overrides the committed fixture)

verbs.name: run
verbs.summary: load a scene and step the deterministic sim headless (FLIGHT-recorded)

flags.name: ticks
flags.doc: run exactly N fixed ticks

flags.name: to-tick
flags.doc: run until the sim tick reaches N

flags.name: seed
flags.doc: sim seed (journal identity + RNG streams)

flags.name: record
flags.doc: run.mrj bundle path (default: the .midday-cache/run/last.mrj scratch bundle)

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.doc: TS build cache directory (default: .midday-cache/ts)

flags.name: assert
flags.doc: drive + verify a registered assertion pack: case=<name> (available: appendix_a_golden, determinism_kata)

verbs.name: journal
verbs.summary: interrogate run.mrj bundles (diff: first-divergent-tick over two runs)

verbs.name: rhi
verbs.summary: GPU seam tools (probe: device availability/caps; render: M0 scenes to PNG + decoded-pixel hashes)

flags.name: backend
flags.doc: seam implementation: vulkan | metal (metal is macOS-only)

flags.name: validation
flags.doc: enable the Vulkan validation layer (refuses if not installed)

flags.name: software
flags.doc: require a software rasterizer (lavapipe class; golden lane sets this)

flags.name: scene
flags.doc: render one scene: clear | triangle | textured_quad (default: all)

flags.name: out-dir
flags.doc: write <scene>.png + <scene>.hash + driver.txt here (render)

flags.name: goldens
flags.doc: compare decoded-pixel hashes against this golden dir (render)

verbs.name: shot
verbs.summary: screenshot tools (compare: two-tier golden comparison — decoded-pixel hash + explicit-threshold tolerance, optional diff image)

flags.name: tolerance
flags.doc: per-channel delta a pixel may carry without counting as over (0-255)

flags.name: max-pct-over
flags.doc: percent of pixels allowed over --tolerance before tier 2 fails

flags.name: max-mean
flags.doc: mean absolute channel delta budget (perceptual drift bound)

flags.name: diff
flags.doc: write an amplified per-pixel delta image (x8, saturated) to this PNG path

verbs.name: validate
verbs.summary: validate a strict-YAML file against a schema_manifest.json format entry

flags.name: schema
flags.doc: format name to look up in the schema manifest's formats[] table

flags.name: manifest
flags.doc: schema manifest path, used with --schema (default: api/schema_manifest.json)

flags.name: schema-file
flags.doc: a standalone format-entry JSON document (bypasses the manifest)

verbs.name: fmt
verbs.summary: canonicalize a strict-YAML file (schema-agnostic; see: midday validate)

flags.name: write
flags.doc: rewrite the file in place with its canonical form

flags.name: check
flags.doc: exit 1 without writing if the file is not already canonical

verbs.name: check
verbs.summary: audit {uid, path} asset references against the project's .uid sidecars

flags.name: fix
flags.doc: repair fixable drift/missing-uid findings in place

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.doc: uid registry cache directory (default: <root>/.midday-cache/uid)

verbs.name: mv
verbs.summary: move an asset (+ its .uid sidecar) and rewrite referencing paths; the uid never changes

flags.name: root
flags.doc: directory to scan for referencing files (default: the current directory)

flags.name: cache-dir
flags.doc: uid registry cache directory (default: <root>/.midday-cache/uid)
